description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker Docker image and the docker:dind service. Define a single job named push that runs in the default stage, with a before_script that executes `docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY`. In the script step the job sets `REGISTRY_PREFIX=$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/` and runs `./build.sh`. The job is limited to the master branch via an only rule and does not produce any artifacts or caches.
